formulas.label: e0320
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\mathit{PW} T^{\mathit{tsf}} = T I \times \underset{l \in Y}{\sum} \underset{i \in \Omega_{T}}{\sum} \underset{\delta \in T}{\sum} p f^{i} \left(\delta\right) + T I / 2 \times \underset{l \in Y}{\sum} \underset{i \in \Omega_{T}}{\sum} \underset{\delta \in T}{\sum} p b^{i} \left(\delta\right) \\ \begin{matrix} & & = T I \times \sum_{l \in Y} \sum_{i \in \Omega_{T}} \sum_{\delta \in T} \sum_{\delta^{'} \subseteq \left[1 , \delta\right]} \left(\mathit{PA} S^{i} \left(\delta^{'}\right) - p b^{i} \left(\delta^{'}\right) + p t^{i} \left(\delta^{'}\right)\right) + T I / 2 \times \sum_{l \in Y} \sum_{i \in \Omega_{T}} \sum_{\delta \in T} p b^{i} \left(\delta\right)\end{matrix} \\ \begin{matrix} & & = \sum_{l \in Y} \sum_{i \in \Omega_{T}} \sum_{\delta \in T} \mathit{TI} \times \left[1 / 2 \times p b^{i} \left(\delta\right) + \sum_{\delta^{'} \subseteq \left[1 , \delta\right]} \left(\mathit{PA} S^{i} \left(\delta^{'}\right) - p b^{i} \left(\delta^{'}\right) + p t^{i} \left(\delta^{'}\right)\right)\right]\end{matrix}\end{matrix}
